news.t: Pandemic germ-killer stocks rally, but consumer staples ETFs underperform

holdings.infoBox: FXG is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are Casey's General Stores stock at 5.07%, Coca-Cola Consolidated at 4.14%, Smithfield Foods at 3.96%, McKesson at 3.87%, and Seaboard at 3.82%.

overview.description: The First Trust Consumer Staples AlphaDEX Fund (FXG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the StrataQuant Consumer Staples index. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap US consumer staples stocks. The underlying index uses multi-factor selection and tiered equal-weighting. FXG was launched on May 8, 2007 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: Pandemic germ-killer stocks rally, but consumer staples ETFs underperform
data.text: Consumer staples exchange-traded funds underperformed Friday, even as personal hygiene products notched some of the biggest gains of the S&P 500 SPX, +0.00% .
